paragraphs: Overdue climbed to 163 — we need to reverse this today. Well below the 7-day average of 174 — the team is making real progress. 40 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 4 tasks should be active but are stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention.

**Ginger Brown:** The oldest overdue task is 40 days past due with 33 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **8 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $36,824 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** The oldest overdue task is 12 days past due with 30 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **23 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** The oldest overdue task is 52 days past due with 28 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **32 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $59,791 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** The oldest overdue task is 19 days past due with 20 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **47 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $17,192 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** The oldest overdue task is 7 days past due with 14 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **36 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Charles Harris — Argyle TX:** The oldest overdue task is 28 days past due with 13 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **20 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Karim-Merchant:** Overdue count is climbing — now at 5. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. 4 tasks should be active right now but are stuck — identify and clear the blockers today. **19 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Shaan Lagisetty (CNG-20251169):** The oldest overdue task is 14 days past due with 7 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **14 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $10,497 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** 7 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **31 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $16,243 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** Overdue count is climbing — now at 4. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **16 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $26,172 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 2 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **12 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 6 payment tasks due this week.
**Giselle Garcia:** Carrying 49 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.
**Jeff:** Carrying 35 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.
**Angel Pacheco:** Carrying 26 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.

284 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **258 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 40 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$112,212 in payments going out this week** across 47 tasks — make sure funds are available. $62,025 expected in from 8 client payments. Heavy week ahead for Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458) and Kyle Aubry - Project 01 — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco's overdue has been growing over the past few days — now at 26. This needs to turn around today.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 20 overdue (oldest: 19d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **47 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 58 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 4 overdue — oldest first. **16 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 17 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 2 overdue — oldest first. **12 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 18 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** 30 overdue (oldest: 12d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **23 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 23 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Karim-Merchant:** 5 overdue — oldest first. 4 active-blocked — clear the blockers to keep moving. **19 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 19 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
Jeff: Jeff's overdue has been growing over the past few days — now at 35. This needs to turn around today.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** 28 overdue (oldest: 52d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **32 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 34 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** 7 overdue — oldest first. **31 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 31 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.

**Ginger Brown:** 33 overdue (oldest: 40d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **8 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
